title: festuca indigesta subsp. curvifolia
intro: Festuca indigesta subsp. curvifolia, also known as the curvifolium fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Festuca indigesta subsp. curvifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
